title: TriggerEngine
description:
Implement the TriggerEngine from docs/design-triggers-schedules.md.

Sections: TriggerEngine

Key deliverables:
- TriggerEngine struct with Run/Add/Remove/List methods
- Event stream subscription (fan-out from monitor.AgentEvent channel)
- Event matching: event type, state, substate (empty = wildcard)
- Condition gate evaluation before firing
- One-shot semantics: consume on attempt (remove regardless of action success)
- Failure logging to session activity log
- Unit tests: fires on match, no match (wrong event/state), substate match,
  wildcard state, condition pass/fail/retry, one-shot removal, remove before fire

References:
- Plan: docs/design-triggers-schedules.md §TriggerEngine
- Depends on: h2-ifg.1 (automation foundation types + ActionRunner)
